8. We know that Music-Genre:dubstep is not to the right of Music-Genre:salsa. Since blueberry is to the right of Transport:ship, it cannot be in the position of dubstep or salsa.

Based on the given premises, the person who has blueberry cannot be a police-officer, photographer, software-developer, teacher, or have any of the given transports or foods mentioned in the premises.
